0.0.0.0 hosts-policy.example.com
plain-policy.example.com
||unsupported-policy.example.com^$future=value
||disabled-policy.example.com^$badfilter
/^regex-policy\.example\.com$/
||covered-policy.example.com^
@@||covered-policy.example.com^
||client-policy.example.com^$client=10.0.0.1
||ctag-policy.example.com^$ctag=pc
||dnstype-policy.example.com^$dnstype=A
||denyallow-policy.example.com^$denyallow=allowed.example.com
||rewrite-policy.example.com^$dnsrewrite=1.2.3.4
||important-policy.example.com^$important
